finite_model: positions are represented only as declared finite residues for this fixture
proof_boundary: external proof-linked source note only; no local theorem resolution or replay
source_version: source note reviewed; external project not built from this repo
verifier_command: not run; future Circle contract replay or local surrogate command required

required_downstream_evidence: local theorem-id resolver or surrogate proof
workload, baseline, metric, and report before performance claims

staleness_policy: Treat source-reported theorem refs as stale for promotion until resolver and fingerprint checks run.
failure_behavior: If resolver, replay, or fingerprint evidence is missing, keep downstream use structural-only or blocked.
